# External figure sources

Each file in this directory is reused under an open Creative Commons
licence. We retain the original author attribution and licence link
required by each licence; downstream users of these lecture notes
inherit the same conditions (CC BY-SA: derivatives must be re-shared
under a compatible licence).

---

## `farallon_tomo_slice.png`

- **Author:** Wikimedia Commons user *Oilfieldvegetarian*, adapting
  Grand, S. P., van der Hilst, R. D., & Widiyantoro, S. (1997),
  *Global Seismic Tomography: A Snapshot of Convection in the Earth*,
  *GSA Today* 7(4), 1–7. (Open access via the Geological Society of
  America.)
- **Licence:** Creative Commons Attribution–ShareAlike 4.0 International
  (CC BY-SA 4.0). <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/>
- **Source page:** <https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:FarallonTomoSlice.png>
- **Direct file:** <https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/eb/FarallonTomoSlice.png>
- **Used in:** `lectures/12_seismic_tomography.md` §5 (worked
  interpretation of a mantle tomographic image — Farallon slab
  beneath North America).

## `african_llsvp_cartoon.jpg`

- **Author:** Sanne Cottaar (University of Cambridge). Uploaded to
  Wikimedia Commons in 2013.
- **Licence:** GNU Free Documentation Licence v1.2+ **and** Creative
  Commons Attribution–ShareAlike 3.0 Unported (CC BY-SA 3.0). We
  reuse under CC BY-SA 3.0. <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/>
- **Source page:** <https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Cartoon_of_African_LLSVP.jpg>
- **Direct file:** <https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d3/Cartoon_of_African_LLSVP.jpg>
- **Used in:** `lectures/12_seismic_tomography.md` §5 (large
  low-shear-velocity provinces at the base of the mantle).

---

## Reuse policy

If you reuse this Jupyter Book as a course resource, you must:

1. Keep this `SOURCES.md` file alongside the figures.
2. Preserve author and licence credit in every figure caption.
3. Apply a compatible (ShareAlike) licence to any modified derivative.

Contact the original authors via their Wikimedia profiles if you
require a different licence.
